title: Reliable Name Tags
description: Lets you right click Name Tags in the air to change their name - a port of Convenient Name Tags to modern versions.
body: # Reliable Name Tags Lets you right-click Name Tags in the air to change their name - a port of Convenient Name Tags to modern versions. ## Installation Reliable Name Tags is a client and server mod for Fabric and NeoForge 1.21.1 and 26.1.2. Its dependencies are listed below. #### Dependencies - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required on Fabric Loader. - [McQoy](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcqoy) is recommended to configure the mod. ## Features - Anvils are no longer required to rename a name tag. Just right click with the name tag, and a screen will open allowing the name tag to be renamed. - Renaming screen supports Placeholder API's QuickText format on Fabric, as well as on NeoForge 26.1+ thanks to an unofficial port. - Items can be renamed by crafting name tags with items. - Renamed mobs will drop their name tags when killed. They can also be sheared to remove the name. ## FAQ - Will this mod be ported to other versions/loaders? - The mod actively supports the latest version of Minecraft (currently 26.1). There is no plan to backport to older versions, please use the [original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/convenient-name-tags). ## License [![Code license (Apache)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-Apache-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/cassiancc/reliable-name-tags/blob/main/LICENSE.txt) Reliable Name Tags is available under the open source Apache 2.0 License. Note that this means you are required to attribute the mod if you use any content from it in your own projects. ## Credits This is a fork of [Convenient Name Tags](https://modrinth.com/mod/convenient-name-tags), which supported Fabric 1.20 and below. Convenient Name Tags is available under the Apache 2.0 license, as is this fork.
